form.formComment: Last start 10th (Fr1) over 1776m after showing early speed at Wagin beaten 30 m by American Monarch (2:13.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 2 at $19. Before that, 7th (Sr2) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 11 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $41. Rates well on best form and worth including.
